data.body: file_impact cleared to []: this ticket ships NO commit of its own — the code change (src/rebar/llm/pai_tools.py + fs_tools.py + tests/unit/test_resolve_symbol_tool.py) landed under the duplicate ticket b27d-269a-2ba3-43b4 (taxing-quasilegal-incatern) in main commit 7a0fac8f5, which carries that ticket's rebar-ticket trailer. My equivalent Gerrit change 710 was abandoned as a duplicate after reaching LLM-Review +1 / Verified +1 (submit 409ed on a textual conflict with the landed fix). See the resolution comment above for the live AC verification evidence.
